summary: MASN and MASN2 24/7 feed - DAI Ads failover at stream start
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for MASN
AND the user launches the MLB.tv Core app
AND the user logs in
AND network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net" are blocked
OR network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net" are failing

*NOTE:* 
MASN entitlement = MASN_110 and MASN_120
Needs to be tested in a browser

MASN Test users:

|Username|Password|
|masn@gmail.com|Password4MASN|
|masnims@gmail.com (In Market)|Password4MASN|
|masnoom@gmail.com (Out of Market)|Password4MASN|
|masnintl@gmail.com (International)|Password4MASN|

steps.action: WHEN the user initiates playback of the 24/7 MASN feed
steps.result:
THEN playback is initiated with no video error modal popping up
AND a gsId is not displayed in the lower right corner of the screen

steps.action: WHEN the user initiates playback of the 24/7 MASN2 feed
steps.result:
THEN playback is initiated with no video error modal popping up
AND a gsId is not displayed in the lower right corner of the screen
